channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump pledges more Iran strikes, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
item.description: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.

item.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
item.description: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said, "We've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."

item.title: Wall Street needs a crash course in the token economy ahead of AI IPOs. SpaceX offers a preview
item.description: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.

item.title: Dow tumbles 700 points as oil jumps on Trump Iran threat, chip stocks continue falling: Live updates
item.description: U.S. forces launched “self-defense strikes” against Iran on Tuesday in retaliation for the downing of a helicopter, pushing up crude oil prices.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Super Micro, Cracker Barrel, Robinhood Markets, truckers & more
item.description: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

item.title: An unusual derivative play off SpaceX’s IPO success: A maker of space gases
item.description: Rothschild & Co. Redburn sees industrial gas supplier Linde emerging as a potential beneficiary alongside SpaceX.

item.title: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
item.description: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.

item.title: Volatility surge has trader eyeing one 'stable' stock
item.description: Mike Khouw is looking for a stable, cash-generating business where he can sell volatility instead of buying drama.

item.title: As gold's tumble continues, traders bet the pain may last for two more years
item.description: Selling in the precious metal just keeps getting worse, with the GLD ETF now down 25% from its intraday record in February.

item.title: Commercial real estate saw record lending competition in April, according to JLL
item.description: Global credit activity among lenders as well as overall competitiveness of loan terms reached an all-time high in April, JLL found.

item.title: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
item.description: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.

item.title: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
item.description: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.

item.title: Sen. Warren calls on SEC to delay SpaceX IPO, flagging concerns about valuation and governance
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.

item.title: A rebound with staying power may be in the cards for this beat-up medical devices ETF
item.description: This latest bounce for the iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (IHI) is no ordinary rally, according to the charts.

item.title: Google and Meta denied new trial in youth social media addiction case
item.description: The companies had sought a new trial in a lawsuit filed by a woman who said she became addicted to YouTube and Instagram at a young age because of their design.

item.title: Trump signs $70 billion immigration funding bill after months of delay
item.description: The $70 billion package will fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of President Donald Trump's term.

item.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for May 2026 — in one chart
item.description: Inflation jumped to a three-year high in May as the Iran war continued to fuel higher energy prices.

item.title: Company that bet big on Trump-backed crypto says its fortunes have improved
item.description: AI Financial Corp. says it has mitigated some of the concerns that prompted it to say earlier that it may not be able to stay in business.

item.title: Amazon trucking expansion sparks freight stock sell-off
item.description: Amazon has been spinning out more of its in-house logistics offerings for others to access, posing a growing threat to industry incumbents.

item.title: Bill Gates tells House panel 'I should have never met' with Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel.

item.title: Starbucks stock is a bright spot in Wednesday's bleak market. Here's why
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Chase unveils massive Sapphire Preferred overhaul: Enhanced rewards, new perks and a crushing transfer partner change
item.description: The Chase Sapphire Preferred is getting a big update. Here's what you need to know about the good and the bad changes happening soon.

item.title: Trump doubles down on Pulte for DNI, calls for short-term extension of foreign surveillance law
item.description: Unless Congress acts, a key provision of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act will expire at the end of this week.

item.title: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if 'perps' trading is any guide
item.description: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual future on Hyperliquid at $162, about 20% above the company's fixed IPO share price of $135.

item.title: Humaniod robotics company raises up to $1.4 billion from Nvidia, Amazon and others
item.description: Investors have rushed to back companies in the physical AI space

item.title: Palantir's Karp says businesses are 'unhappy' with the frontier AI labs
item.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp says AI will drive the most important political decisions in the U.S. and shouldn't be decided by party lines.

item.title: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal
item.description: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.

item.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
item.description: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.

item.title: Private credit lenders say their big software bet faces an AI reckoning — but not a ‘SaaSpocalypse'
item.description: Private credit's exposure to software is being tested by AI, as lenders look past “SaaSpocalypse” fears to identify winners and losers.

item.title: Autonomous EV freight trucking company Einride rises sharply in first trade on Nasdaq
item.description: Self-driving freight truck technology company Einride rose significant in its first day of trading on the Nasdaq after a SPAC deal.
